campaignName: Digital Forge AI Side Hustle Starter Funnel
niche: AI-powered digital products and side hustles for Nigerians

audience.primary: Nigerians who want to build and sell practical digital products using AI and simple tools.
audience.secondary: Creators, freelancers, operators, and knowledge workers who want a cleaner path into digital product income.

promise.headline: How To Build and Sell Your First AI-Powered Digital Product From Nigeria
promise.subheadline: Free practical training showing you how to turn what you already know into a simple digital product, package it properly, and start promoting it with AI and everyday tools.

training.title: How To Build and Sell Your First AI-Powered Digital Product From Nigeria
whatYouWillLearn: How to choose a digital product idea people can quickly understand and pay for
How to use AI to speed up product creation without getting lost in tool chaos
How to package and promote your offer with simple content and direct-response assets
coreMethod: Choose a commercially useful product angle
Build and package the product with AI assistance
Promote it with simple channels and repeatable messaging

offer.name: Digital Forge Side Hustle Starter System
offer.summary: A practical starter system for choosing, building, packaging, and promoting your first AI-powered digital product.

proof.authorityBlock: Digital Forge is built around practical product systems, not random prompt collections. The goal is to help you choose a stronger angle, build a clearer offer, and move into the market faster with less confusion.

whoItsFor: Nigerians who want a practical digital side hustle
Creators and freelancers who want to package useful knowledge into an offer
Operators who want a cleaner path from idea to product to promotion
optIn.whyNow: AI has made building digital products faster and cheaper, but most people are still stuck in tool overload, weak product ideas, poor packaging, and random content with no offer behind it. This training shows a cleaner path.

thankYou.headline: You’ve Successfully Reserved Your Spot
instructions: Check your email for your access details
Use the training link when you’re ready
Watch the full session before deciding on the full system

trainingPage.headline: How To Build and Sell Your First AI-Powered Digital Product From Nigeria
trainingPage.supportingLine: A practical training showing you how to go from scattered ideas and AI confusion to one clear product, one clean offer, and one realistic path to selling it.

offerPage.headline: Get The Full Digital Forge Side Hustle Starter System
offerPage.summary: If the training gave you the framework, this gives you the implementation layer: the guide, the prompts, the checklists, the templates, and the content support so you can move faster with more clarity and less guesswork.

faq.question: Is this for complete beginners?
faq.answer: Yes. It is built for people who want a practical starting point, even if they have never launched a digital product before.

faq.question: Do I need expensive tools?
faq.answer: No. The system is designed around accessible tools and clear execution.

faq.question: Is this just another ebook?
faq.answer: No. It is a starter system with implementation assets, not just reading material.

faq.question: What if I already feel overwhelmed by AI tools?
faq.answer: That is exactly why this exists. The whole point is to reduce noise and give you a cleaner path.
